overview.description: The T-REX 2X Long RBLX Daily Target ETF (RBLU) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the Roblox Corp. Class A index. The fund aims to provide 2x leveraged exposure to the daily price movement of Roblox Corp. stock (NYSE: RBLX), less fees and expenses. RBLU was launched on Mar 4, 2025 and is issued by Tuttle Capital Management.
